requirement_topic.en: Filtering Respirator Safety — UNBS Adoption of EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3)
requirement_topic.zh: 过滤式呼吸器安全——UNBS采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）
requirement_topic.zht: 過濾式呼吸器安全——UNBS採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）

summary.en: UNBS technical baseline for respirators is built on EN 149 class-based performance with KN and medical pathways treated separately. For occupational filtering respirators, classes FFP1, FFP2 and FFP3 apply and test evidence is expected for aerosol efficiency, breathing resistance, inward leakage behaviour, carbon dioxide content, and clogging/handling characteristics under practical use assumptions. Uganda market files often note that US standards references and IEC-based test practice can be used for technical interoperability, especially for accessories and measurement equipment context.
summary.zh: UNBS对呼吸器的技术基准以EN 149分类性能为核心，且与医用路径区分。面向职业呼吸防护时，采用FFP1、FFP2、FFP3等级，并要求对气溶胶效率、吸阻、内漏行为、吸入二氧化碳含量及阻塞与使用特性进行可核验测试。乌干达市场文件通常说明可参考美国标准及IEC测试实践以处理检测互操作性，尤其用于附件与计量相关设备场景。
summary.zht: UNBS對呼吸器的技術基準以EN 149分類性能為核心，且與醫用路徑區分。面向職業防護時採用FFP1、FFP2、FFP3等級，並要求對氣膠效率、吸阻、內漏行為、吸入二氧化碳含量及阻塞與使用特性進行可核驗測試。烏干達市場文件通常說明可參考美國標準及IEC測試實踐以處理檢測互操作性，尤其用於附件與計量相關設備場景。

standards_or_laws: UNBS-adopted EN 149 technical framework for filtering facepiece respirators
US and IEC-referenced test-method references used for compatibility context

summary.en: China relies on GB 2626-2019 for industrial respirators, with KN90 and KN95 classes and CNAS laboratory testing patterns. GB 2626 is a domestic baseline and is useful for preliminary screening, but differences in method breadth and destination documentation make it insufficient as standalone Uganda safety evidence.
summary.zh: 中国工业口罩依赖GB 2626-2019，使用KN90与KN95等级并采用CNAS实验室检测。GB 2626有助于国内筛查，但其方法体系和目的地文件结构与乌干达安全证据范围存在差异，不能作为单一合格依据。
summary.zht: 中國工業口罩依賴GB 2626-2019，使用KN90與KN95等級並採用CNAS實驗室檢測。GB 2626有助於國內篩查，但其方法體系和目的地文件結構與烏干達安全證據範圍存在差異，不能作為單一合格依據。

standards_or_laws: CNAS testing framework under Chinese market oversight

gap.en: The practical gap is not only nominal class mapping. Uganda-facing technical files should include EN 149 test scope evidence aligned to the exact marketed model and any accessory variant. A KN95 laboratory report alone is not sufficient for Uganda occupational release where EN 149 pathway validation is requested.
gap.zh: 实际差距不只在名称映射。乌干达向市场提交的技术资料应覆盖面向具体型号和附件版本的EN 149测试范围。单独提交KN95检测报告通常不足以满足乌干达职业用途放行所需的EN 149验证。
gap.zht: 實際差距不只在名稱映射。烏干達向市場提交的技術資料應覆蓋面向具體型號及附件版本的EN 149測試範圍。單獨提交KN95檢測報告通常不足以滿足烏干達職業用途放行所需的EN 149驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 149 class evidence and model-matched technical dossier are required for occupational UNBS route documents
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626 compliance records are mandatory for the China domestic market, but are not the sole Uganda route evidence.

source.publisher: UNBS technical publications and related laboratory guidance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda requires EN 149 class-consistent occupational respiratory evidence for workplace models. GB 2626 KN-level documentation supports domestic screening only and should not be treated as direct Uganda acceptance evidence unless adapted to the UNBS route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达对职业型号要求提供EN 149等级一致的技术证据。GB 2626 KN级别文件仅能用于国内筛查，不应直接视为乌干达认可证据，除非按UNBS路径进行适配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達對職業型號要求提供EN 149等級一致的技術證據。GB 2626 KN級別文件僅能用於國內篩查，不應直接視為烏干達認可證據，除非按UNBS路徑進行適配。

requirement_topic.en: Medical-Protective Masks and Radio-Capable Accessories — Separate Health and UCC Controls
requirement_topic.zh: 医用防护口罩与具无线功能配件——独立的卫生与UCC管理
requirement_topic.zht: 醫用防護口罩與具無線功能配件——獨立的衛生與UCC管理

summary.en: Masks positioned for clinical protection, infection control, or surgical-like use are not treated as occupational respirators in Uganda. They follow the national health regulator route, with separate documentation for intended medical use. For models including radio modules, the radio function is reviewed under Uganda Communications Commission expectations, and safety declaration should mention compatibility with Uganda electricity context only where applicable.
summary.zh: 面向临床防护、感染控制或外科用途声明的口罩不按职业呼吸器处理，而改由国家卫生监管部门路线管理，需提供对应医疗用途文件。若型号包含无线电模块，须按UCC要求补充通信侧信息；若涉及电气附件则需结合乌干达220/240环境电压声明进行补充。
summary.zht: 面向臨床防護、感染控制或外科用途聲明的口罩不按職業呼吸器處理，而改由國家衛生監管部門路徑管理，需提供對應醫療用途文件。若型號包含無線電模組，須按UCC要求補充通信側資訊；若涉及電氣附件則需結合烏干達240 V用電背景進行聲明。

standards_or_laws: National health authority route for medical masks in Uganda
Uganda Communications Commission regulation framework for radio-capable devices
UNBS occupational respirator standard pathway excludes clinical-use models

summary.en: GB 19083-2010 is China’s medical-protective baseline and is processed under NMPA medical pathways. This is not a direct substitute for Uganda health-regulator routing. Accessory-led radio declarations are not resolved through GB 19083 alone and require destination-specific telecom interpretation.
summary.zh: 中国的GB 19083-2010是医用防护口罩基准，由NMPA医疗器械路径处理。该国内基准并不等同乌干达的医疗监管路径。涉及通信配件的声明也不能仅靠GB 19083解决，需结合目的地通信规则解读。
summary.zht: 中國的GB 19083-2010是醫用防護口罩基準，由NMPA醫療器械路徑處理。該國內基準並不等同烏干達的醫療監管路徑。涉及通信配件的聲明也不能僅靠GB 19083解決，需結合目的地通信規則解讀。

standards_or_laws: UCC telecom-related declarations where radio or wireless modules are present

gap.en: Using one compliance file for both workplace respirator and medical claims is the highest-risk gap pattern. Uganda expects clean route separation and evidence that radio-capable claims are reviewed under telecom expectations. Exporters should avoid mixed-language routing and submit destination-specific documentation per model.
gap.zh: 一个文件混合处理职业口罩与医用诉求是最常见高风险差距。乌干达要求用途与文件路径分离，并需证明无线功能已按通信监管逻辑处理。出口商应避免混合路径文本，按型号分别提交目的地文件。
gap.zht: 一個文件混合處理職業口罩與醫用訴求是最常見高風險差距。烏干達要求用途與文件路徑分離，並需證明無線功能已按通信監管邏輯處理。出口商應避免混合路徑文本，按型號分別提交目的地文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — route separation between workplace respirator and medical products; radio-capable models need UCC-aligned declarations as applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 19083 and related NMPA documentation are mandatory in China for medical-protective products but do not replace Uganda healthcare or UCC routing.

source.publisher: Uganda Communications Commission and Uganda health sector notices

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Medical or surgical claims must not be run as occupational EN 149 imports only. Medical route and telecom-function checks must be treated separately in Uganda destination documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 医疗或外科主张不能按职业EN 149路径单独通关。乌干达目的地文件中应单独处理医疗路径与通信功能检查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 醫療或外科主張不能按職業EN 149路徑單獨通關。烏干達目的地文件中應單獨處理醫療路徑與通信功能檢查。
